rationale: Review 2's only finding (the two new imports in TauCeti.lean are out of the established alphabetical order used by all prior entries: FieldTheory.* must precede NumberTheory.*, and within NumberTheory the EffectiveBounds pair must precede Multiquadratic) is exactly grounded in the shown diff and is a material placement violation that maintainers routinely require fixing; acting on it produces a cleaner, consistent PR. Review 1's blanket approve leaves that violation untouched.
